SEARCH

Package com.dhk.view

package com.dhk.view
  • Class
    Description
    AboutDialog
    Shows an "About Display Hot Keys" dialog on the AWT event dispatching thread.
    AbstractDraggableDialog
    Defines an abstract draggable dialog that defines a method to initialize the mouse listeners.
    DhkView
    Defines the view for Display Hot Keys.
    FrameUpdater
    Updates the view for Display Hot Keys.
    IView
    Interface for views.
    MinimizeToTray
    Enables the application to be minimized to the system tray and restored from the system tray.
    Slot
    Defines the view components of a Slot.
    ViewRefresher
    Starts a view refresher on a new thread.
